name: Expel
description: Monitor Expel Workbench MDR platform for security alerts, investigations, device health, and user access management

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Expel Workbench at https://workbench.expel.io
2. Go to Organization Settings > Service Accounts
3. Create a new service account with the appropriate role (admin or analyst)
4. Copy the generated API key
5. Paste the API key in the field below

checks.name: Expel App Availability
checks.description: Verifies connectivity to the Expel Workbench API and validates API key authentication

checks.name: Expel Alert Management
checks.description: Checks for open critical and high severity alerts in Expel Workbench that may require immediate attention

checks.name: Expel Incident Response
checks.description: Reviews recent investigations and flags open incidents that need attention

checks.name: Expel Security Device Health
checks.description: Verifies that connected security devices in Expel Workbench are healthy and operational

checks.name: Expel Employee Access
checks.description: Lists user accounts and their roles in Expel Workbench for access review
